name: Media Commands
description: Persistent Discord media panel and media stack shortcuts.

panelChannelId.description: Discord channel id for the resident media panel message.

panelMessageId.description: Optional fixed Discord message id to edit instead of using plugin state.

mediaMcpUrl.description: Media MCP Streamable HTTP URL used by panel-triggered MVP actions.

autoPost.description: Post or repair the resident panel on plugin startup.
